goal: Build an industrial pick-and-place cell in Isaac Sim: a Franka Panda on a 2x1x0.75m table picks 5cm cubes from a conveyor belt in front of the robot and drops them into an open-top 0.3x0.3x0.15m bin behind the robot. Belt runs at low speed along +X; controller pauses belt during each pick, reads cube position after settling, plans cuRobo trajectory, descends, grips, lifts, transits, drops. Verified 4/4 cubes delivered with target_source='curobo', smooth motion + visible belt travel between picks.
thoughts:
Nine non-obvious patterns for CP-01:
1) Table top at z=0.75 anchors all heights (Franka base, belt, cubes, bin floor).
2) Franka orientation [0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068] (90° around Z) so cube/belt at world +Y is in robot's natural pick direction. Without this the wrist bumps cube during descent.
3) PhysicsScene MUST use CPU dynamics: enable_gpu_dynamics=False + broadphase_type='MBP'. PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI is silently ignored under GPU broadphase — belt won't move cubes.
4) Surface velocity carries cubes ~3× the configured nominal due to PhysX stick-slip with high-friction material. Set surface_velocity to ~1/3 of desired apparent speed.
5) Cubes need physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold=0. Without this PhysX deactivates resting cubes when belt is paused, surface velocity skips sleeping bodies → cube stuck on resume. Apply PhysxRigidBodyAPI then bulk_set_attribute.
6) Cubes start OUTSIDE robot's 0.70m horizontal pick reach so belt has visible work carrying each into the pick zone sequentially.
7) Apply 'rubber' physics material to cubes ONLY — NOT to fingers. Binding to fingers fires PhysX 'triangle mesh on dynamic body' warnings that pop modal-style on every Play and block the viewport. Combined-friction rubber-cube vs default-mu fingers gives ~0.75 effective grip — sufficient.
8) DomeLight required: viewport renders black after new_stage() without one. Set inputs:intensity=1000.
9) target_source='curobo' for smoothest motion + scene-collision-aware planning.
code:
# DomeLight — without this the viewport renders black after new_stage()
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

# Parent Xform
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Table — Cube default size=2, scale to 2x1x0.75m with top at z=0.75
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# CPU dynamics required for PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Franka on table, oriented so cube/belt at world +Y is in robot's base +X
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Long conveyor belt in front of robot. Apparent speed ~3x nominal due
# to PhysX stick-slip with high-friction material.
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Cubes start OUTSIDE robot's 0.70m pick reach so belt has visible work.
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

# sleepThreshold=0 on all cubes so they stay awake on paused belt
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# Rubber on cubes only — combined-friction with default-mu fingers gives ~0.75 effective.
# Binding material to Franka fingers fires PhysX 'triangle mesh on dynamic body' warnings
# that block the viewport on Play (CP-02 pattern).
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Bin behind robot, floor flush on table top
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

# Pick station inside robot reach
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# cuRobo controller — best motion quality, with planning_obstacles + belt path
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
code_template:
# DomeLight
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

# Parent Xform
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# CPU dynamics required for PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Franka on table
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# Conveyor belt in front of robot
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Workpieces
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Destination bin
create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

# Pick station sensor
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# cuRobo controller
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
failure_modes: PhysicsScene without enable_gpu_dynamics=False → PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI silently ignored, belt doesn't move cubes.

Cubes without physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold=0 → PhysX sleeps them when belt is paused (between picks); surface velocity is friction-mediated and skips sleeping bodies → cube stuck even when belt resumes. Apply PhysxRigidBodyAPI then bulk_set_attribute.
Cubes inside robot's 0.70m horizontal reach at start → controller pauses belt immediately for the closest cube and never resumes between picks → belt never visibly moves.

No friction material anywhere → cube slips during lift. Apply rubber to cubes only (NOT fingers — that fires PhysX triangle-mesh-on-dynamic-body warnings that block the viewport on Play). Combined-friction rubber-cube vs default-mu finger gives ~0.75 effective which is sufficient.
Reading cube position before pause+settle → trajectory aims behind where cube ends up resting → fingers grip back edge of cube. cuRobo handler does this internally via 'settling' state (8 ticks).
Robot orientation = identity instead of [0.7071, 0, 0, 0.7071] → cube at world +Y is at 90 to robot's natural pick direction → wrist bumps cube during descent.
Setting EE_INITIAL_HEIGHT manually below robot base → IK target below base → arm folds. Auto-compute is correct.
Using target_source='spline' on a GPU-equipped machine — older default; cuRobo gives smoother motion.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (with 180s sim — duration_s=60 was too short for cuRobo + 4-cube conveyor cycle. cube_final=(-0.004, -0.46, 0.835) inside Bin)
